tweets.content: TikTok's new algo rule: completion rate threshold jumped to ~65%. Your first 3 seconds decide if it lives or dies. Hook harder. Test faster. Most creators don't know this shift happened yet.
Instagram just made DM shares the #1 ranking signal (not likes). Content that gets forwarded to friends in DMs gets algorithmic boost. This changes everything for viral mechanics.
One piece of long-form content → 20 optimized micro-versions via AI → distribute hub-and-spoke style → 3x reach per content unit. This is the 2026 content leverage play.

thread.title: Platform Algorithm Shifts Q1 2026: What Changed (And How to Exploit It)
content:
Platform algorithms shifted dramatically Q1 2026. Most creators are running 2025 strategies on 2026 systems. Here's what actually changed and how to win:

[1/8]
TikTok: Completion rate threshold increased from ~55% to ~65%. Means your video needs to hold attention longer or it gets buried. First 3 seconds decide everything. [2/8]
IG: DM shares now = primary ranking signal (beating likes). Content that gets forwarded to friends gets algorithmic boost. Conversational hooks > engagement hooks. [3/8]
YouTube Shorts: Search SEO now matters. Add keywords to descriptions. Shorts that rank in search get 50-60% more reach than pure discovery feed. [4/8]
TikTok Creator Rewards: 10x payout variance by niche. Gaming, education, fitness hitting highest CPMs (~$0.10-0.30 per view). News/politics CPMs collapsed. [5/8]
Distribution shift: One long-form → 20 micro-versions via AI automation → hub-and-spoke distribution = 3x reach per content unit spent. Most efficient format right now. [6/8]
What doesn't work anymore: Low-effort reposts, trend-jacking without original angle, engagement bait without sharing mechanism, follower-count obsession. [7/8]
Playbook: Make original content → optimize for first 3s hook + watch completion → distribute as 20 variations → incentivize DM shares + platform-specific SEO. Test in 72h windows. [8/8]
